heading: Procedure
body:
To configure the type of connection:

Click the Connect button for your federated database instance.

You can choose one of the following options:

- Standard connection - to configure this type of
  connection, you must do the following:

  - [Add Your IP Address to the IP Access List](add-ip-address)

  - [Create a Database User for Your Federated Database Instance](create-mdb-user)

- Private endpoint - to configure this type of
  connection, you must do the following:

  - [Atlas Data Federation](config-private-endpoint)

  - [Create a Database User for Your Federated Database Instance](create-mdb-user)

> **Note:** If you specify `0.0.0.0` in your project [IP access
> list](atlas/security/ip-access-list), Atlas will accept all
> connections including those over PrivateLink.
